name: mem0 — AI Agent Long-term Memory
description: Persistent memory layer for AI agents — stores user preferences, facts, and context across sessions using vector search
author: AI OS Core Team

exposed_api.name: add_memory
exposed_api.description: Store a new memory for a user/agent
exposed_api.input: messages: list[dict], user_id: str, agent_id: str

exposed_api.name: search_memory
exposed_api.description: Retrieve relevant memories for a query
exposed_api.input: query: str, user_id: str, limit: int

exposed_api.name: get_all
exposed_api.description: Get all memories for a user

conflict_check.result: CLEAR — different memory domains. claude-mem=Claude Code session, mem0=autonomous agent

notes: Phase 1 integration. OPEN-004 partial coverage (memory layer). Does NOT replace LightRAG (knowledge graph) or open-notebook (document RAG).
